entries.signature: public static SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace CreateCicp (SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp colorPrimaries, SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp transferCharacteristics);

fields.returns: A new <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace" /> corresponding to the specified CICP parameters, or <see langword="null" /> if the combination is not supported.
fields.summary: Creates a color space from CICP color primaries and transfer function values.

params.colorPrimaries: One of the enumeration values that specifies the color primaries.
params.transferCharacteristics: One of the enumeration values that specifies the transfer function.
